description:
This table presents a cross-reference between Urban Atlas (UA) Land Cover (LCLU) classification codes and nomenclature for 2006, 2012, and 2018, and their corresponding Riparian Zone (RZ) nomenclature and codes. It also specifies the updated RZ CODE when integrating UA2012/2018 data within UA Urban Centres.

| UA Land Cover Code (2006/2012/2018) | UA Land Cover Nomenclature (2
